_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description:
You can:
- develop an organisational data strategy that supports the organisation’s objectives
- identify underlying causes of data challenges faced by other leaders and make strategic recommendations to resolve them
- decide what data technologies and changes are needed to better support organisational strategy
Examples of leadership using this skill:
- aligning the data strategy and organisational strategy to create shared direction and increased trust
- changing operations in the organisation to be more aware of, and driven by, data
- changing the organisation’s view of data so it is viewed as an asset, not a risk or liability
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of enterprise data strategy frameworks, including data governance operating models, data architecture principles, and the organizational interdependencies that determine data program effectiveness.
comments: DDaT skill superset of WIDAI DG domain. DG-K-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-T-010 (LS, cosine: 0.595), DG-A-002 (DG, cosine: 0.589).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.0/10 (raw 0.603). Shared vocabulary: [data, strategy]. DDaT-only terms [aligning, asset, aware, better, causes, challenges] vs WIDAI-only terms [architecture, determine, effectiveness, enterprise, frameworks, governance] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.850 (P=0.831, R=0.870). R exceeds P by 0.039 — the WIDAI KSA's 23 words are well-captured by the DDaT element's 100 words, but the DDaT element contains broader scope not fully reflected in the matched WIDAI KSA.

nli_cross_encoder.significance:
NLI: neutral-dominant (99.0%). "You can:
- develop an organisational data strategy that supports the organisatio" and "Knowledge of enterprise data strategy frameworks, including data governance oper" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.572 ≈ STS 0.603 (gap 0.030). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [data, strategy] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 7.4%. Shared tokens: [data, strategy]. DDaT-only: [aligning, asset, aware, better, causes, challenges]. WIDAI-only: [architecture, determine, effectiveness, enterprise, frameworks, governance].
